results.rendered_html: dehalī (von dih; vgl. dehī u. deha) f. gaṇa gaurādi zu  P. 4,1,41 . Aufwurf vor einem Hause, Auftritt, Schwelle, Terrasse  AK. 2,2,12 .  H. 1009 . ˚līṣu (v. l. ˚liṣu)  ŚĀṄKH. GṚHY. 2,14 . dehalīmuktapuṣpaiḥ  MEGH. 85 . madgṛhadehalīnām  MṚCCH. 6,17 . dvārṣu vidrumadehalyā bhātam  BHĀG. P. 3,23,18 . Die Form dehali kennt  ŚABDAR.

results.rendered_html:
dehaliḥ -lī f. The threshold of
(pb) a door, the sill or lower part of the wooden frame of a door; vinyasyaṃtī bhuvi gaṇanayā dehalīdattapuppaiḥ  Me. 87 ;  Mk. 1. 9. 
Comp.
— dīpaḥ a lamp suspended over the threshold; ˚nyāya see under nyāya.
